task_completion.description: Verify that the Autopsy case 'Deletion_Differential_2024' with case number 'INV-DIFF-006' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy main window title bar or case properties showing the case name 'Deletion_Differential_2024' and case number 'INV-DIFF-006'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the disk image 'ntfs_undel.dd' was added as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Sources tree in the Autopsy UI shows 'ntfs_undel.dd'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first part of the differential analysis report contains the required statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of `/home/ga/Reports/deletion_differential.txt` including ALLOCATED_FILE_COUNT, DELETED_FILE_COUNT, TOTAL_USER_FILES, and DELETION_RATIO.

task_completion.description: Verify the differential analysis report contains the file lists and type distributions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `deletion_differential.txt` file shows sections ALLOCATED_FILES, DELETED_FILES, TYPE_DISTRIBUTION_ALLOCATED, and TYPE_DISTRIBUTION_DELETED with actual file data.

task_completion.description: Verify the differential analysis report contains the assessment and justification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `deletion_differential.txt` file shows DELETION_PATTERN_ASSESSMENT (SYSTEMATIC, INCIDENTAL, or INCONCLUSIVE) and ASSESSMENT_JUSTIFICATION.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary report was created with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing `/home/ga/Reports/deletion_summary.txt` with CASE_NUMBER, IMAGE_FILE, FILESYSTEM, DELETION_RATIO, TYPES_ONLY_IN_DELETED, TYPES_ONLY_IN_ALLOCATED, and DELETION_PATTERN_ASSESSMENT.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Autopsy to analyze the disk image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Autopsy GUI open with the data source loaded and files being examined, rather than relying solely on terminal commands like fls or icat.

integrity.description: Verify the reports contain actual data extracted from the image, not placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text files contain real numbers for counts/ratios and real filenames, instead of the literal template strings like '<N>' or '<filename>'.

integrity.description: Verify that NTFS system metadata files were excluded from the reports.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file lists in `deletion_differential.txt` do not contain files starting with '$' (e.g., $MFT, $LogFile, $Bitmap).
